title: Fill a region with tonal engraving (line density follows a tone field) — engrave_fill
text: engraving counterpart hachure_fill_multi(): instead one uniform hatch, lays engrave_ladder() hatch layers keeps layer field tone reaches layer's threshold, line density (cross-hatching) tracks tone continuously across region. Holes handled exactly hachure_fill_multi() (shared even-odd scan-line).

title: Fill a region with tonal engraving (line density follows a tone field) — engrave_fill
code: engrave_fill(   rings,   field,   ladder = NULL,   roughness = 0.5,   bowing = 0,   sample_step = NULL,   seed = NULL,   ... )

title: Fill a region with tonal engraving (line density follows a tone field) — engrave_fill
text: rings list rings, list(x, y) vertex coordinates inch/data space (see hachure_fill_multi()). field vectorised tone function function(x, y) returning value [0, 1] per point (0 = lightest/paper, 1 = darkest/solid). ladder hatch ladder engrave_ladder(); NULL, default ladder built .... roughness, bowing Sketch params applied surviving stroke. Defaults 0.5 0. sample_step Tone-sampling step along scan line (inches). NULL (default) uses fraction finest ladder pitch. seed Integer seed. ... Passed engrave_ladder() ladder NULL.

title: Fill a region with tonal engraving (line density follows a tone field) — engrave_fill
text: list 2-column (x, y) stroke matrices (structure hachure_fill_multi()), densest field darkest.

what: Build a tonal hatch ladder for engraving fills — engrave_ladder
title: Build a tonal hatch ladder for engraving fills — engrave_ladder
text: engraving ladder ordered list hatch layers; applied tone field least threshold, darker regions accumulate (finer, cross-hatched) layers. Defaults trace classic etching progression: sparse base layer, denser -angle lines, second angle (cross-hatch), fine angles read black.

title: Build a tonal hatch ladder for engraving fills — engrave_ladder
code: engrave_ladder(   n_levels = 5L,   base_gap = 0.1,   gap_ratio = 0.62,   base_angle = 45,   cross_after = 3L,   cross_angle = 90,   tone_floor = 0.12,   tone_ceiling = 0.92 )

title: Build a tonal hatch ladder for engraving fills — engrave_ladder
text: n_levels Number hatch layers. Default 5. base_gap Pitch (inches) sparsest layer. subsequent layer tightens geometrically toward base_gap * gap_ratio^(n_levels - 1). Default 0.10. gap_ratio Multiplicative pitch shrink per layer (0 < r <= 1; smaller = faster densening). Default 0.62. base_angle Angle (degrees) first layer. Default 45. cross_after Layer index (1-based) cross-hatching begins; layer , angles alternate cross_angle. Default 3. cross_angle Angular offset (degrees) cross direction. Default 90. tone_floor, tone_ceiling Tone thresholds first last layers; layers' thresholds spread evenly . region tone tone_floor left blank (paper); tone tone_ceiling gets every layer. Defaults 0.12 0.92.

title: Build a tonal hatch ladder for engraving fills — engrave_ladder
text: list layers, list(gap, angle, threshold).

title: Force-directed graph layout (Fruchterman-Reingold) — force_layout
text: pure-R implementation Fruchterman-Reingold force-directed layout, geom_sketch_node() / geom_sketch_edge() can place network external graph dependency. Repulsive forces push every node apart; attractive forces pull edge-connected nodes together; cooling schedule settles system. Coordinates returned rescaled roughly [-1, 1] axes.

title: Force-directed graph layout (Fruchterman-Reingold) — force_layout
code: force_layout(edges, n_nodes = NULL, niter = 500L, seed = NULL)

title: Force-directed graph layout (Fruchterman-Reingold) — force_layout
text: edges two-column matrix data frame 1-based integer node indices, one row per edge (, ). May zero rows (edgeless graph, laid circle). n_nodes Number nodes. Defaults largest index edges (isolated high-index nodes need set explicitly). niter Number iterations. Default 500. seed Integer seed initial placement. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). layout otherwise deterministic.

title: Force-directed graph layout (Fruchterman-Reingold) — force_layout
text: data frame columns x y, one row per node index order.

title: Sketchy alluvial / Sankey diagram — geom_sketch_alluvial
text: Draws hand-drawn alluvial diagram: two categorical axes, stack strata (boxes), connected flows (ribbons) whose thickness frequency category combination. Like geom_sketch_chord() constructor returns list ordinary sketch layers (roughened strata, roughened flow ribbons smooth S-curved edges, stratum labels), composes + fill scale. draws ordinary x/y space; pair theme_void() theme_sketch(). new dependencies (cf. ggalluvial, ggsankey).

title: Sketchy alluvial / Sankey diagram — geom_sketch_alluvial
code: geom_sketch_alluvial(   data,   axes,   value = NULL,   fill = NULL,   ...,   box_width = 0.18,   stratum_gap = 0.02,   fill_style = "solid",   alpha = 0.7,   strata_fill = "grey85",   label = TRUE,   label_size = 3.5,   label_colour = "grey20",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL )

title: Sketchy alluvial / Sankey diagram — geom_sketch_alluvial
text: data wide data frame: one column per axis, one row per observation (per group, value weight). axes Character vector column names use axes, order (least two). value Optional column name giving row's weight (NULL = 1 ). fill Optional column name whose category colours flow (NULL = first axis). Add scale_fill_sketch() fill scale style . ... arguments passed flow layer. box_width Width stratum boxes x units. Default 0.18. stratum_gap Vertical gap adjacent strata, fraction axis total. Default 0.02; 0 stacks flush. fill_style Flow fill style; see geom_sketch_polygon(). Default "solid". alpha Flow opacity. Default 0.7. strata_fill Fill colour stratum boxes. Default "grey85". label Draw stratum labels? Default TRUE. label_size, label_colour Label text controls. roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters.

Edges coloured source node; add scale_colour_sketch() (colour scale). new dependencies.

Default 2. alpha Arc opacity. Default 0.7. label Draw node labels? Default TRUE. label_size, label_colour Label text controls. roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters.

title: Sketchy content-aware arrows — GeomSketchArrow
text: Draws hand-drawn arrow (x, y) (xend, yend), optional handwriting label source. "content-aware" three ways:

title: Sketchy content-aware arrows — GeomSketchArrow
code: GeomSketchArrow  geom_sketch_arrow(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   curvature = "auto",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   arrow_length = NULL,   arrow_angle = 25,   arrow_type = "open",   arrow_head = NULL,   ends = "last",   family = NULL,   label_gap = 0.012,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = FALSE,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy content-aware arrows — GeomSketchArrow
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires x, y, xend, yend; label optional. data Data one row per arrow. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. curvature Shaft bend. "auto" (default) picks gentle bow; number sets explicitly (0 straight, positive/negative bow either side). roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = clean). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). arrow_length Arrowhead length inches. NULL (default) adapts shaft length. arrow_angle Half-angle arrowhead degrees. Default 25. arrow_type "open" (default) draws two-stroke V; "closed" draws filled rough triangle. Superseded arrow_head; kept back-compat. arrow_head Arrowhead style, one sketch_arrowheads(): "triangle_open", "triangle_filled", "barb" (swept harpoon barbs), "fishtail" (forked swallowtail), "dot" (blob) "bar" (perpendicular tick). NULL (default) derives arrow_type. ends end(s) carry head: "last" (default), "first" "" (double-headed arrow). family Font family label. Defaults family theme_sketch() (getOption("ggsketch.base_family", ""), .e. device default), label matches plot's text; set options(ggsketch.base_family = "auto") handwriting face, pass explicit family . label_gap Gap label anchor source point, npc. Default 0.012. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? Default FALSE. inherit.aes Inherit aesthetics plot? Default TRUE.

title: Sketchy content-aware arrows — GeomSketchArrow
text: ggplot2 layer object.

title: Sketchy content-aware arrows — GeomSketchArrow
text: shaft curvature defaults automatic, pleasing bow whose side follows direction travel (curvature = "auto"); arrowhead roughened oriented curve's end tangent, always points target however shaft bends; label justifies away target, never sits shaft. one-annotations, annotate_sketch_arrow() easiest entry point.

Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy 2-D bin heatmap — geom_sketch_bin2d
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation.  Default "identity" geom_sketch_col(); "count" geom_sketch_bar(). position Position adjustment.  Default "stack". ... arguments passed layer. bins Number bins direction. Default 30. binwidth Bin width(s); overrides bins supplied. roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight lines). mappable aesthetic (default 1): pass constant, map per bar aes(roughness = ) (rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). fill_style One "hachure", "cross_hatch", "zigzag", "zigzag_line", "scribble", "dots", "dashed", "stipple", "pencil_shade", "solid". Default "hachure". hachure_angle Fill line angle degrees. Default 45. hachure_gap Fill line gap device inches (NULL = 15% bar's smaller drawn side, clamped [0.04, 0.4] inches). fill_weight Stroke weight fill lines. Default 0.5. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

Default 0.6. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). padding Box padding around label, inches. NULL (default) adapts leader length. arrow_angle Half-angle leader arrowhead degrees. Default 25. arrow_head Leader head style, one sketch_arrowheads(). NULL (default) draws open V. leader Leader routing: "straight" (default), "elbow" (horizontal vertical, flowchart style) "curved" (bowed Bezier). curvature Bow size leader = "curved". Default 0.3. family Font family label. Defaults family theme_sketch() (getOption("ggsketch.base_family", ""), .e. device default), label matches plot's text; set options(ggsketch.base_family = "auto") handwriting face, pass explicit family . na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? Default FALSE. inherit.aes Inherit aesthetics plot? Default TRUE.

title: Sketchy chicklet chart — GeomSketchChicklet
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation.  Default "identity" geom_sketch_col(); "count" geom_sketch_bar(). position Position adjustment. Default "stack". ... arguments passed layer. roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight lines). mappable aesthetic (default 1): pass constant, map per bar aes(roughness = ) (rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. title: Sketchy dendrogram (hierarchical-clustering tree) — geom_sketch_dendrogram
text: Draws hand-drawn dendrogram: leaves along one axis merge bracketed cluster height, right-angle elbows roughened hand-drawn wobble. Pass either ready stats::hclust() object numeric data frame / matrix (tree computed via stats::hclust(stats::dist(x))). Like geom_sketch_chord() constructor returning list ordinary sketch layers (elbow paths + leaf labels), composes +; pair theme_void() theme_sketch(). Pure base stats; new dependencies (cf. ggdendro).

text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires x. data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. binwidth Bin width data units. NULL (default) uses 1/30 data range. dotsize Dot diameter multiple bin width. Default 1. stackratio Vertical spacing stacked dots, fraction dot diameter. Default 1. stackdir Stacking direction. "" currently supported. roughness Non-negative dot roughness. Default 0.6. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy empirical cumulative distribution — geom_sketch_ecdf
text: geom_sketch_ecdf() draws empirical CDF continuous variable hand-drawn stairstep - sketch analogue ggplot2::stat_ecdf() / geom_step(stat = "ecdf"). Needs x aesthetic; group gets curve.

title: Sketchy empirical cumulative distribution — geom_sketch_ecdf
code: geom_sketch_ecdf(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "ecdf",   position = "identity",   ...,   n = NULL,   pad = FALSE,   roughness = 0.8,   bowing = 0.5,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy empirical cumulative distribution — geom_sketch_ecdf
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. n NULL (default), ECDF jumps observed value; otherwise curve evaluated n evenly spaced points (passed ggplot2::stat_ecdf()). pad TRUE, add -Inf/Inf plateaus ends. Default FALSE (roughened line spans data range , avoiding infinite coordinates). roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight). Default 1. geom_sketch_segment() mappable aesthetic (map per segment aes(roughness = ), rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()); geom_sketch_step() layer parameter (one path per group). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

what: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
title: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
text: hand-drawn take network/graph plotting. geom_sketch_edge() draws roughened connector (x, y) (xend, yend); geom_sketch_node() draws roughened node markers optional handwriting labels. Pair sketch_graph(), computes node positions pure-R force-directed layout (force_layout()) returns two data frames geoms expect - graph package required.

title: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
code: GeomSketchEdge  geom_sketch_edge(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   curvature = 0,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  GeomSketchNode  geom_sketch_node(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   roughness = NULL,   bowing = NULL,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   label_size = 3.2,   label_colour = "grey15",   label_family = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. geom_sketch_edge() rows need x/y/xend/yend; geom_sketch_node() need x/y (optional label). Typically $edges $nodes sketch_graph(). stat, position Statistical transformation position adjustment. Default "identity" . ... arguments passed layer. curvature Edge bend. 0 (default) draws straight roughened edges; non-zero gives arc edges (quadratic Bezier), like geom_sketch_curve(). roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters; see geom_sketch_path(). geom_sketch_node(), roughness mappable aesthetic (per node). na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend, inherit.aes Standard layer arguments. label_size Handwriting label size (mm). Default 3.2. label_colour Label colour. Default "grey15". label_family Label font family. Defaults first installed handwriting face (geom_sketch_text() uses).

title: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
text: ggplot2 layer object.

title: Sketchy network edges and nodes — GeomSketchEdge
code: library(ggplot2) edges <- data.frame(   from = c("A", "A", "B", "C", "C", "D"),   to   = c("B", "C", "C", "D", "E", "E") ) g <- sketch_graph(edges, seed = 1L) ggplot() +   geom_sketch_edge(data = g$edges,                    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend), seed = 1L) +   geom_sketch_node(data = g$nodes,                    aes(x = x, y = y, label = name), size = 6, seed = 2L) +   coord_equal() +   theme_void()

what: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
text: geom_sketch_engrave() shades surface way etcher banknote engraver : continuous tone built density hand-drawn hatch lines, cross-hatching deepening shadows. takes regular grid x, y, z (like ggplot2::geom_raster()); z mapped tone (high = dark default). Unlike fill-pattern packages, tone computed geometry (engrave_fill() ladder), tiled motif.

title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
code: GeomSketchEngrave  GeomSketchShade  geom_sketch_engrave(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   levels = 5L,   base_gap = 0.08,   gap_ratio = 0.62,   base_angle = 45,   cross_after = 3L,   reverse = FALSE,   roughness = 0.5,   bowing = 0.3,   min_gap_in = 0.012,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  geom_sketch_shade(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   levels = 5L,   base_gap = 0.08,   gap_ratio = 0.62,   base_angle = 45,   cross_after = 3L,   roughness = 0.5,   bowing = 0.3,   min_gap_in = 0.012,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). geom_sketch_engrave() needs x, y, z; geom_sketch_shade() needs x, y uses tone aesthetic (default 0.6). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. levels Number hatch layers ladder. Default 5. base_gap Pitch sparsest layer (npc-x fraction). Default 0.08. gap_ratio Multiplicative pitch shrink per layer (smaller = densens faster). Default 0.62. base_angle Angle first hatch layer (degrees). Default 45. cross_after Layer index cross-hatching begins. Default 3. reverse (geom_sketch_engrave() ) Invert tone mapping low z dark. Default FALSE. roughness Non-negative stroke roughness. Default 0.5. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 0.3. min_gap_in Pitch floor inches; finer ladder layers dropped. Default 0.012. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
text: ggplot2 layer object.

title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
text: geom_sketch_shade() shades polygon region uniform density set tone aesthetic [0, 1], mapped value reads directly darkness – hand-drawn alternative solid fill scale. hatch ladder stack layers increasing density rotating angle (levels, base_gap, gap_ratio, base_angle, cross_after); layer drawn tone reaches threshold, light areas keep sparse base layer shadows accumulate every layer. min_gap_in pitch floor (inches) keeps darkest tones exploding runaway number strokes.

title: Sketchy engraving: tonal shading by hatch-line density — GeomSketchEngrave
code: library(ggplot2) ggplot(faithfuld, aes(waiting, eruptions, z = density)) +   geom_sketch_engrave(seed = 1L) +   theme_sketch()   # A real surface: an engraved relief map of Maungawhau (Mt Eden), # the way a 19th-century atlas shades elevation by hatch density. volcano_df <- expand.grid(   easting  = seq_len(nrow(volcano)),   northing = seq_len(ncol(volcano)) ) volcano_df$height <- as.vector(volcano)  ggplot(volcano_df, aes(easting, northing, z = height)) +   geom_sketch_engrave(     levels = 8L, base_gap = 0.04, gap_ratio = 0.72,     roughness = 0.35, bowing = 0.2, seed = 1L   ) +   coord_equal() +   labs(title = "Maungawhau", subtitle = "engraved by elevation") +   theme_sketch()

title: Sketchy function curve — geom_sketch_function
text: Draws curve function y = fun(x) hand-drawn stroke - sketch analogue ggplot2::geom_function(), built ggplot2::stat_function().

title: Sketchy function curve — geom_sketch_function
code: geom_sketch_function(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "function",   position = "identity",   ...,   fun = NULL,   xlim = NULL,   n = 101,   args = list(),   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = FALSE )

title: Sketchy function curve — geom_sketch_function
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation (default "identity"). position Position adjustment (default "identity"). ... arguments passed layer. fun Function evaluate, name string. xlim Optional numeric range evaluate fun; defaults panel x range. n Number points sample along curve. Default 101. args List extra arguments passed fun. roughness Non-negative roughness parameter (0 = straight). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes double-stroke effect. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). na.rm FALSE (default), missing values removed warning. show.legend Logical. layer included legend? inherit.aes FALSE, override default aesthetics.

title: Sketchy funnel chart — StatSketchFunnel
text: Draws hand-drawn funnel: one horizontal bar per stage, centred zero, whose width stage's value (x), shrinking bars read drop-stages (y). Translucent trapezoids connect stage next. Put first stage top ordering y factor levels accordingly (add scale_y_discrete(limits = rev)); hide mirrored x axis theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) relabel scale_x_continuous(labels = abs).

Default 0.3. fill_style Bar fill style; see geom_sketch_rect(). Default "hachure". roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy Gantt / timeline chart — GeomSketchGantt
text: Draws hand-drawn Gantt chart: one roughened bar per task x (start) xend (end) discrete y – whiteboard project-planning look. Map optional progress aesthetic (0 1) overlay slimmer, darker solid bar completed fraction task. Works dates, date-times plain numbers x axis, every fill_style (including "watercolor"); corner_radius rounds bar ends.

title: Sketchy Gantt / timeline chart — GeomSketchGantt
code: GeomSketchGantt  geom_sketch_gantt(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   height = 0.55,   progress_shade = 0.65,   corner_radius = 0.15,   fill_style = "hachure",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy Gantt / timeline chart — GeomSketchGantt
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires x, xend y; optionally progress (completed fraction, 0-1). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. height Bar height y units. Default 0.55. progress_shade Channel multiplier (< 1 darkens) progress overlay's fill. Default 0.65. corner_radius Corner rounding bars; see geom_sketch_rect(). Default 0.15. fill_style Bar fill style; see geom_sketch_rect(). Default "hachure". roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy Gantt / timeline chart — GeomSketchGantt
code: library(ggplot2) plan <- data.frame(   task  = factor(c("Design", "Build", "Test", "Ship"),                  levels = rev(c("Design", "Build", "Test", "Ship"))),   start = as.Date(c("2026-01-05", "2026-01-19", "2026-02-09", "2026-02-23")),   end   = as.Date(c("2026-01-23", "2026-02-13", "2026-02-27", "2026-03-06")),   done  = c(1, 0.7, 0.25, 0) ) ggplot(plan, aes(x = start, xend = end, y = task, fill = task,                  progress = done)) +   geom_sketch_gantt(seed = 1L, show.legend = FALSE) +   theme_sketch()

code: GeomSketchHex  geom_sketch_hex(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "binhex",   position = "identity",   ...,   bins = 30,   binwidth = NULL,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   fill_style = "hachure",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = NULL,   fill_weight = 0.5,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy hexagonal heatmap — GeomSketchHex
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation.  Default "identity" geom_sketch_col(); "count" geom_sketch_bar(). position Position adjustment.  Default "stack". ... arguments passed layer. bins Number hexagons direction. Default 30. binwidth Hexagon width(s); overrides bins supplied. roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight lines). mappable aesthetic (default 1): pass constant, map per bar aes(roughness = ) (rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). fill_style One "hachure", "cross_hatch", "zigzag", "zigzag_line", "scribble", "dots", "dashed", "stipple", "pencil_shade", "solid". Default "hachure". hachure_angle Fill line angle degrees. Default 45. hachure_gap Fill line gap device inches (NULL = 15% bar's smaller drawn side, clamped [0.04, 0.4] inches). fill_weight Stroke weight fill lines. Default 0.5. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy line geom — GeomSketchLine
text: Draws roughened line connecting points order x. Equivalent geom_line() sketch aesthetic.

title: Sketchy line geom — GeomSketchLine
code: GeomSketchLine  geom_sketch_line(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   medium = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy line geom — GeomSketchLine
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation (default "identity"). position Position adjustment (default "identity"). ... arguments passed layer. roughness Non-negative roughness parameter (0 = straight). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes double-stroke effect. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). medium Drawing medium stroke: one sketch_media() ("pen", "ink", "fountain_pen", "ballpoint", "brush", "pencil", "charcoal", "pastel", "chalk", "marker", "highlighter", "crayon", "spray"). NULL (default) uses "pen", classic constant-width double stroke; others render variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine (tapered ink, brushy swells, grainy pencil/charcoal, dusty chalk, translucent highlighter band, ...), "spray" renders soft airbrush dot cloud (sketch_spray_grob()). medium also mappable aesthetic: map aes(medium = ) (one medium per group) control mapping scale_medium_discrete(). na.rm FALSE (default), missing values removed warning. show.legend Logical. layer included legend? inherit.aes FALSE, override default aesthetics.

title: Sketchy interval geoms — GeomSketchLinerange
text: Hand-drawn uncertainty intervals x: geom_sketch_linerange() draws vertical range ymin ymax; geom_sketch_pointrange() adds point y; geom_sketch_errorbar() adds end caps; geom_sketch_crossbar() draws rough box line y. Like geom_sketch_chord() constructor returning list ordinary sketch layers (tiles coloured fill, column labels, optional width-percent labels), composes + fill scale; pair theme_void() theme_sketch().

title: Sketchy path geom — GeomSketchPath
code: GeomSketchPath  geom_sketch_path(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   medium = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy path geom — GeomSketchPath
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation (default "identity"). position Position adjustment (default "identity"). ... arguments passed layer. roughness Non-negative roughness parameter (0 = straight). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes double-stroke effect. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). medium Drawing medium stroke: one sketch_media() ("pen", "ink", "fountain_pen", "ballpoint", "brush", "pencil", "charcoal", "pastel", "chalk", "marker", "highlighter", "crayon", "spray"). NULL (default) uses "pen", classic constant-width double stroke; others render variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine (tapered ink, brushy swells, grainy pencil/charcoal, dusty chalk, translucent highlighter band, ...), "spray" renders soft airbrush dot cloud (sketch_spray_grob()). medium also mappable aesthetic: map aes(medium = ) (one medium per group) control mapping scale_medium_discrete(). na.rm FALSE (default), missing values removed warning. show.legend Logical. layer included legend? inherit.aes FALSE, override default aesthetics.

title: Sketchy path geom — GeomSketchPath
text: Map aes(pressure = ) variable make stroke swell thin along line, like pen pressed harder places. line drawn variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine even default medium = "pen", combines non-pen medium (width profiles multiply). mapped values rescaled scale_pressure_continuous(); wrap base::() raw multipliers.

what: Sketchy pie and donut charts — StatSketchPie
title: Sketchy pie and donut charts — StatSketchPie
text: geom_sketch_pie() draws hand-drawn pie chart: one slice per row, sized amount aesthetic coloured fill. geom_sketch_donut() hole middle. Slices kept circular regardless panel's shape, look right without coord_fixed(). chart drawn centre panel; pair theme_sketch() ggplot2::theme_void() hide (unused) axes.

title: Sketchy pie and donut charts — StatSketchPie
code: GeomSketchPie  geom_sketch_pie(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = StatSketchPie,   position = "identity",   ...,   x0 = 0.5,   y0 = 0.5,   r = 0.45,   r0 = 0,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 0.4,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   fill_style = "solid",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = 0.02,   fill_weight = 0.5,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  geom_sketch_donut(..., r0 = 0.25)

title: Sketchy pie and donut charts — StatSketchPie
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires amount; map fill colour slices. data Data one row per slice. stat statistic; defaults StatSketchPie, converts amount slice angles. position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. x0, y0 Pie centre npc [0,1]. Default 0.5 (panel centre). r Outer radius fraction smaller panel dimension. Default 0.45. r0 Inner radius (hole) fraction smaller panel dimension. 0 (default) full pie; geom_sketch_donut() defaults 0.25 (ring r0 r). roughness Non-negative roughness slice edges (0 = clean). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 0.4 (kept low radial edges stay straight-ish). n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). fill_style "solid" (default) paints slice fill colour rough edge; style ("hachure", "cross_hatch", "zigzag", "scribble", "dots", "dashed", "stipple", "pencil_shade") hatches instead. hachure_angle Fill line angle degrees. Default 45. hachure_gap Spacing fill lines, fraction smaller panel dimension – hatch density knob: smaller denser. Default 0.02. fill_weight Stroke weight fill lines. Default 0.5. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

code: library(ggplot2) pop <- data.frame(   age = factor(rep(c("0-19", "20-39", "40-59", "60+"), 2),                levels = c("0-19", "20-39", "40-59", "60+")),   sex = rep(c("Female", "Male"), each = 4),   n   = c(340, 420, 380, 240, 360, 440, 370, 200) ) ggplot(pop, aes(n, age, side = sex, fill = sex)) +   geom_sketch_pyramid(seed = 1L) +   scale_x_continuous(labels = abs) +   theme_sketch()

title: Sketchy quantile-quantile plot — geom_sketch_qq
text: geom_sketch_qq() draws Q-Q points (sketch analogue ggplot2::geom_qq() / ggplot2::stat_qq()); geom_sketch_qq_line() adds reference line (ggplot2::geom_qq_line()). Map data sample aesthetic.

title: Sketchy quantile-quantile plot — geom_sketch_qq
code: geom_sketch_qq(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "qq",   position = "identity",   ...,   distribution = stats::qnorm,   dparams = list(),   roughness = 0.5,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  geom_sketch_qq_line(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "qq_line",   position = "identity",   ...,   distribution = stats::qnorm,   dparams = list(),   roughness = 0.6,   bowing = 0.5,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy quantile-quantile plot — geom_sketch_qq
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings. Supports x, y, colour, size, alpha, roughness. data Data display. stat Statistical transformation (default "identity"). position Position adjustment (default "identity"). ... arguments passed layer. distribution Quantile function theoretical distribution. Default stats::qnorm. dparams List parameters distribution. roughness Non-negative roughness parameter (0 = straight). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes double-stroke effect. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). na.rm FALSE (default), missing values removed warning. show.legend Logical. layer included legend? inherit.aes FALSE, override default aesthetics.

title: Sketchy radar (spider) chart — StatSketchRadar
text: Draws hand-drawn radar chart: series closed polygon evenly spaced angular axes, roughened web (concentric rings, radial spokes, axis labels) drawn behind. Map axis (variable becomes spoke, usually factor), value (magnitude), group (series); map colour/fill series . Values scaled common unit radius (rmax), polygon takes fill_style (including "watercolor"). new dependencies (cf. ggradar, fmsb::radarchart()).

title: Sketchy radar (spider) chart — StatSketchRadar
code: StatSketchRadar  GeomSketchRadar  geom_sketch_radar(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "sketch_radar",   position = "identity",   ...,   rmax = NULL,   fill_style = "hachure",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = NULL,   fill_weight = 0.5,   n_rings = 4L,   grid_colour = "grey75",   label_size = 3.2,   label_colour = "grey30",   label_family = NULL,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy radar (spider) chart — StatSketchRadar
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires axis value; usually also map group (colour/fill) series. data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "sketch_radar". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. rmax Value mapped outer ring (NULL = data maximum). fill_style Polygon fill style; see geom_sketch_polygon(). Default "hachure". hachure_angle, hachure_gap, fill_weight Fill controls; see geom_sketch_polygon(). n_rings Number concentric grid rings. Default 4. grid_colour Colour web (rings + spokes). Default "grey75". label_size, label_colour, label_family Axis-label text controls. roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

title: Sketchy radar (spider) chart — StatSketchRadar

title: Sketchy rectangle / tile geom — GeomSketchRect
text: Draws filled rectangles hand-drawn roughened outline hachure, cross-hatch, zigzag, dots, dashed, solid fill.  geom_sketch_rect() takes xmin/xmax/ymin/ymax aesthetics; geom_sketch_tile() takes x/y centres optional width/height (like ggplot2::geom_tile()).

title: Sketchy rectangle / tile geom — GeomSketchRect
code: GeomSketchRect  geom_sketch_rect(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   roughness = NULL,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   fill_style = "hachure",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = NULL,   fill_weight = 0.5,   corner_radius = 0,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  GeomSketchTile  geom_sketch_tile(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   roughness = NULL,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   fill_style = "hachure",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = NULL,   fill_weight = 0.5,   corner_radius = 0,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy rectangle / tile geom — GeomSketchRect
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight). mappable aesthetic (default 1): pass constant, map per rectangle aes(roughness = ) (rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). fill_style One "hachure", "cross_hatch", "zigzag", "zigzag_line", "scribble", "dots", "dashed", "stipple", "pencil_shade", "solid". Default "hachure". hachure_angle Fill line angle degrees. Default 45. hachure_gap Fill line gap device inches (NULL = 15% rectangle's smaller drawn side, clamped [0.04, 0.4] inches). fill_weight Stroke weight fill lines. Default 0.5. corner_radius Corner rounding fraction [0, 1] half-side. 0 (default) gives sharp corners; 1 fully rounds ends. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics? width, height Tile size overrides geom_sketch_tile(). NULL uses data resolution.

title: Sketchy rectangle / tile geom — GeomSketchRect

title: Sketchy ridgeline (joyplot) — StatSketchDensityRidges
text: Draws hand-drawn ridgeline plot: kernel density x category discrete y, raised baseline ridges overlap changing shape distribution easy compare. Densities computed positioned StatSketchDensityRidges; ridge filled outlined usual sketch look, ridges drawn back--front nearer ones sit top (cf. ggridges::geom_density_ridges()).

title: Sketchy ridgeline (joyplot) — StatSketchDensityRidges
code: StatSketchDensityRidges  GeomSketchRidgeline  geom_sketch_ridgeline(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "sketch_density_ridges",   position = "identity",   ...,   scale = 1.8,   bandwidth = NULL,   n = 256L,   rel_min_height = 0,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   fill_style = "hachure",   hachure_angle = 45,   hachure_gap = NULL,   fill_weight = 0.5,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy ridgeline (joyplot) — StatSketchDensityRidges
text: mapping Aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). Requires x (usually discrete) y. data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "sketch_density_ridges". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. scale Vertical scaling: many y units tallest ridge spans. Values 1 make ridges overlap. Default 1.8. bandwidth Kernel bandwidth passed stats::density(). Default NULL (automatic per group). n Number density evaluation points. Default 256. rel_min_height Drop density tails fraction global peak, trimming long thin feet. Default 0 (keep ). roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight). Default 1. bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). fill_style One "hachure", "cross_hatch", "zigzag", "zigzag_line", "scribble", "dots", "dashed", "stipple", "pencil_shade", "solid", "watercolor". Default "hachure". hachure_angle Fill line angle degrees. Default 45. hachure_gap Fill line gap npc units (NULL = 6% diagonal). fill_weight Stroke weight fill lines. Default 0.5. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics?

what: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
title: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
text: Draws hand-drawn coxcomb (polar area) chart: category x occupies equal angular wedge value sets radius, wedges fan like rose. area_true = TRUE sector area (radius) encodes value, Florence Nightingale's original mortality roses. optional fill category stacks radially within wedge. Like geom_sketch_chord() constructor returning list ordinary sketch layers (roughened annular sectors + labels), composes +; pair coord_equal() theme_void(), add scale_fill_sketch().

title: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
code: geom_sketch_rose(   data,   x,   value,   fill = NULL,   ...,   area_true = FALSE,   fill_style = "solid",   alpha = 0.9,   colour = "grey30",   label = TRUE,   label_size = 3.2,   label_colour = "grey20",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL )

title: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
text: data data frame. x Unquoted column name category sets angular wedges. value Unquoted column name giving magnitude (radius / area). fill Optional unquoted column name second category stack radially within wedge (NULL = one segment per wedge, coloured x). ... arguments passed sector layer. area_true TRUE, sector area proportional value (radius square root) - Nightingale's convention. Default FALSE (radius ∝ value). fill_style Sector fill style; see geom_sketch_polygon(). Default "solid". alpha Sector opacity. Default 0.9. colour Sector outline colour. Default "grey30". label Draw category labels around rim? Default TRUE. label_size, label_colour Label text controls. roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters.

title: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
text: list ggplot2 layers.

title: Sketchy coxcomb / Nightingale rose chart — geom_sketch_rose
code: library(ggplot2) deaths <- data.frame(   month = month.abb,   n     = c(12, 18, 25, 30, 22, 15, 10, 14, 20, 28, 24, 16) ) ggplot() +   geom_sketch_rose(deaths, month, n, area_true = TRUE, seed = 1L) +   scale_fill_sketch() +   coord_equal() +   theme_void()

what: Sketchy segment and step geoms — GeomSketchSegment
title: Sketchy segment and step geoms — GeomSketchSegment
text: geom_sketch_segment() draws roughened straight segments (x, y) (xend, yend).  geom_sketch_step() connects points hand-drawn stairstep.  Sketch analogues ggplot2::geom_segment() / ggplot2::geom_step().

title: Sketchy segment and step geoms — GeomSketchSegment
code: GeomSketchSegment  geom_sketch_segment(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   roughness = NULL,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   medium = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  GeomSketchStep  geom_sketch_step(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   stat = "identity",   position = "identity",   ...,   direction = "hv",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   medium = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Sketchy segment and step geoms — GeomSketchSegment
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). data Data display. stat Statistical transformation. Default "identity". position Position adjustment. Default "identity". ... arguments passed layer. roughness Non-negative roughness (0 = straight). Default 1. geom_sketch_segment() mappable aesthetic (map per segment aes(roughness = ), rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()); geom_sketch_step() layer parameter (one path per group). bowing Non-negative bowing multiplier. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L). medium Drawing medium stroke: one sketch_media(). default "pen" classic constant-width double stroke; others ("ink", "brush", "pencil", "chalk", "marker", "highlighter", "crayon") render variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine. na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; include legend? inherit.aes Override default aesthetics? direction geom_sketch_step(): "hv" (horizontal vertical, default) "vh".

title: Sketchy simple-features (sf) maps — GeomSketchSfPolygon
text: hand-drawn take ggplot2::geom_sf(). Roughens boundaries sf geometry: (MULTI)POLYGON features filled hole-aware hachure (fill_style), (MULTI)LINESTRING features become sketch paths, (MULTI)POINT features become sketch points. One call draws whichever geometry types present.

title: Sketchy simple-features (sf) maps — GeomSketchSfPolygon
code: GeomSketchSfPolygon  geom_sketch_sf(   mapping = ggplot2::aes(),   data = NULL,   ...,   fill_style = "hachure",   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = FALSE )

title: Sketchy simple-features (sf) maps — GeomSketchSfPolygon

Default "hachure". roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters; see geom_sketch_path(). na.rm Remove missing values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend, inherit.aes Standard layer arguments. inherit.aes defaults FALSE (geom_sf()).

title: Sketchy streamgraph — StatSketchStream
text: Draws hand-drawn streamgraph (.k.. ThemeRiver): stacked area chart whose baseline floats coloured bands flow around moving centre, good showing categories rise fall time. Map x (usually time), y (value), fill (category). Values stacked baseline offset StatSketchStream; band drawn roughened ribbon, takes fill_style (including "watercolor"). new dependencies (cf. ggstream::geom_stream()).

title: Sketchy streamgraph — StatSketchStream

title: Sketchy sunburst (hierarchy) chart — geom_sketch_sunburst
text: Draws hand-drawn sunburst: hierarchy rendered nested rings annular sectors. columns named levels define hierarchy outermost-- innermost (levels[1] inner root ring); deeper ring splits parent's angular span children's summed value, child always nests inside parent. Like geom_sketch_chord() constructor returning list ordinary sketch layers (roughened annular sectors plus optional labels), composes +; pair coord_equal() theme_void(), add scale_fill_sketch() (fill scale) colour . Reuses new dependencies (cf. sunburstR, plotly).

title: Sketchy sunburst (hierarchy) chart — geom_sketch_sunburst
code: geom_sketch_sunburst(   data,   levels,   value = NULL,   ...,   r0 = 0.15,   ring_width = NULL,   fill_by = c("root", "self", "depth"),   fill_style = "solid",   alpha = 0.9,   colour = "grey30",   label = FALSE,   label_size = 3,   label_colour = "grey20",   min_label_angle = 0.15,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL )

title: Sketchy sunburst (hierarchy) chart — geom_sketch_sunburst
text: data data frame, one row per observation (per leaf). levels Character vector column names giving hierarchy, inner root ring outward (least one). value Optional column name giving leaf weight (NULL = every row counts 1). ... arguments passed sector layer. r0 Radius central hole, unit circle. Default 0.15. ring_width Radial width ring. NULL (default) divides space r0..1 evenly across levels. fill_by sector fill encodes: "root" (default, top-level ancestor - classic sunburst look), "self" (node's label), "depth" (ring number). fill_style Sector fill style; see geom_sketch_polygon(). Default "solid". alpha Sector fill opacity. Default 0.9. colour Sector outline colour. Default "grey30". label Draw label sector? Default FALSE (sunbursts get busy; sectors wide enough angle labelled). label_size, label_colour Label text controls. min_label_angle Minimum angular span (radians) sector needs labelled. Default 0.15. roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters.

title: Sketchy sunburst (hierarchy) chart — geom_sketch_sunburst
text: list ggplot2 layers.

title: Sketchy sunburst (hierarchy) chart — geom_sketch_sunburst
code: library(ggplot2) df <- data.frame(   region = c("West", "West", "West", "East", "East", "East"),   dept   = c("Sales", "Sales", "Eng", "Sales", "Eng", "Eng"),   team   = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),   n      = c(4, 2, 6, 3, 5, 1) ) ggplot() +   geom_sketch_sunburst(df, levels = c("region", "dept", "team"),                        value = "n", seed = 1L) +   scale_fill_sketch() +   coord_equal() +   theme_void()

title: Sketchy text and labels — geom_sketch_text
code: library(ggplot2) df <- data.frame(x = c(1, 2, 3), y = c(2, 3, 1),                  lab = c("alpha", "bravo", "charlie"))  # `family = ""` uses the device default, so this runs on any device. ggplot(df, aes(x, y, label = lab)) +   geom_sketch_text(size = 6, family = "") +   theme_sketch()   # With no `family`, the first installed handwriting font is used instead (see # `ggsketch_check_fonts()`). That requires a font-capable device (ragg, # svglite, cairo); pass `family = ""` (above) for fully portable output on any # device, including the base pdf() / postscript().

what: ggsketch: Grammar-Native Hand-Drawn Geoms for 'ggplot2' — ggsketch-package
title: ggsketch: Grammar-Native Hand-Drawn Geoms for 'ggplot2' — ggsketch-package
text: Provides 'ggplot2' geoms render hand-drawn, sketchy aesthetic: roughened strokes, double-pass lines, hachure, cross-hatch, zigzag, dots fill patterns. Implemented pure-R 'grid' grobs wrapped 'ggproto' geoms, composable aes(), stats, scales, faceting. Works every R graphics device (PDF, PNG, SVG, screen) browser dependency. Algorithms reimplemented published 'rough.js' algorithm description (Shihn, 2020, https://shihn.ca/posts/2020/roughjs-algorithms/) Wood others (2012, doi:10.1109/TVCG.2012.262 ); see NOTICE file package sources attribution.

title: ggsketch: Grammar-Native Hand-Drawn Geoms for 'ggplot2' — ggsketch-package
text: Maintainer: Arijit Ghosh arijitghosh2009@gmail.com Authors: Arijit Ghosh arijitghosh2009@gmail.com

text: toothy sketch_papers() ground , number watercolour wash uses feather edges (grain argument watercolor_wash()). Smooth grounds wick little; rough grounds (aged, kraft) wick lot. Smooth, machine papers (notebook / graph / dotted) sit low; textured grounds climb toward theme_sketch(paper = ) reads washes drawn paper pick tooth automatically.

code: paper_grain(kind)

code: paper_grain("kraft") #> [1] 1 paper_grain("graph") #> [1] 0.15

what: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
title: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
text: Registers font file family name systemfonts geom_sketch_text(), theme_sketch() (base_family = "auto"), font resolver can find font-aware devices (ragg, svglite, cairo) without installing font system-wide. Call per session (e.g. script .Rprofile); ship .ttf/.otf alongside project fully reproducible output.

title: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
code: register_sketch_font(   family,   plain,   bold = plain,   italic = plain,   bolditalic = plain,   ... )

title: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
text: family Family name register font (e.g. "Caveat"). name pass family = base_family =. plain Path regular/plain font file (.ttf .otf). bold, italic, bolditalic Optional paths bold/italic faces; default plain. ... Passed systemfonts::register_font().

title: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
text: Invisibly, registered family name.

title: Register a handwriting font for reproducible sketch text — register_sketch_font
code: # Register any font file under a family name you choose. Here we reuse a font # already on the system; in practice point `plain` at a handwriting .ttf/.otf # (e.g. Caveat from Google Fonts). f <- systemfonts::system_fonts()$path[1] register_sketch_font("MySketchFont", f) #> ✔ Registered font family "MySketchFont".

what: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout
title: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout
text: small physical solver behind geom_sketch_text_repel() / geom_sketch_label_repel(). label starts near anchor pushed three forces, iterated rest: boxes overlap shove apart along axis least penetration (preferring axis room left inside bounds, pairs pressed panel corner escape along edge instead staying stuck); box covering anchor point slides ; weak spring pulls box back toward anchor labels stay close name. Positions clamped xlim / ylim.

title: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout
code: repel_layout(   ax,   ay,   w,   h,   xlim = c(-Inf, Inf),   ylim = c(-Inf, Inf),   box_padding = 0.1,   point_padding = 0.05,   max_iter = 2000L,   seed = NULL )

title: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout
text: ax, ay Anchor points (one per label), single isotropic space (e.g. device inches). w, h Label box width height (units), recycled anchors. xlim, ylim Length-2 bounds box centres kept within. box_padding, point_padding Extra clearance around boxes around anchor points, units. max_iter Maximum solver iterations. Default 2000. seed Integer seed (tiny start jitter separates labels sharing anchor).

title: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout
text: list x, y (resolved box centres) iter (iterations actually run).

title: Repel overlapping label boxes away from each other and their anchors — repel_layout

what: Roughen an elliptical arc into one or more sketch stroke paths — rough_arc
title: Roughen an elliptical arc into one or more sketch stroke paths — rough_arc
text: open-arc sibling rough_ellipse(). Samples arc arc length, displaces point slightly, returns n_passes overlaid strokes double-stroke hand-drawn look. Unlike full ellipse path left open (ends joined).

title: Roughen an elliptical arc into one or more sketch stroke paths — rough_arc

title: Roughen an elliptical arc into one or more sketch stroke paths — rough_arc
text: cx, cy Centre coordinates inch space. rx, ry Semi-axis radii inches. start, end Start/end angle radians (counter-clockwise positive x-axis; end may less start). roughness Non-negative roughness parameter. Default 1. n_passes Number stroke overlays. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility.

title: Roughen an elliptical arc into one or more sketch stroke paths — rough_arc
text: List n_passes 2-column (x, y) matrices stroke points.

what: Roughen a cubic Bezier curve — rough_bezier
title: Roughen a cubic Bezier curve — rough_bezier

title: Roughen a cubic Bezier curve — rough_bezier
text: P0, P1, P2, P3 Control points length-2 numeric vectors c(x, y) inch space. roughness Non-negative roughness radius (inches). Default 1. bowing Bowing multiplier (currently applied Bezier control points separately; roughness serves role). Default 1. n_passes Number stroke passes. Default 2. seed Integer seed reproducibility. tol Flatness tolerance. Default max(roughness * 0.01, 1e-4). rdp_eps RDP epsilon. Default max(roughness * 0.005, 1e-5).

title: Roughen a cubic Bezier curve — rough_bezier
text: List n_passes 2-column (x, y) matrices.

what: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
text: geom_sketch_line() geom_sketch_path() let map variable pressure (aes(pressure = z)) stroke swells thins along line, like real pen pressed harder places. scale rescales variable's observed range band width multipliers, just scale_size() rescales size range. applied automatically whenever pressure mapped continuous variable, call directly change range. use values raw width multipliers rescaling, wrap base::() (aes(pressure = (z))).

title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
code: scale_pressure_continuous(..., range = c(0.2, 1.6), guide = "none")  scale_pressure(..., range = c(0.2, 1.6), guide = "none")

title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
text: ... arguments passed ggplot2::continuous_scale(). range Output width-multiplier range. Default c(0.2, 1.6): lightest pressure draws stroke 0.2x base width, heaviest 1.6x. guide Legend guide. Defaults "none" legend keys reflect pressure; set "legend" show one anyway.

title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
text: ggplot2 scale object.

title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
text: Mapping pressure renders line variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine even default medium = "pen", combines non-pen medium (medium's width profile multiplied mapped pressure).

title: Continuous scale for the sketch pressure aesthetic — scale_pressure_continuous
code: library(ggplot2)  # A line whose width tracks a variable, rescaled to c(0.2, 1.6) automatically. ggplot(economics[1:120, ], aes(date, unemploy, pressure = unemploy)) +   geom_sketch_line(linewidth = 1, seed = 1L)   # Widen the band for a more dramatic swell. ggplot(economics[1:120, ], aes(date, unemploy, pressure = unemploy)) +   geom_sketch_line(linewidth = 1, seed = 1L) +   scale_pressure_continuous(range = c(0.05, 2.5))

what: Continuous scale for the sketch roughness aesthetic — scale_roughness_continuous
title: Continuous scale for the sketch roughness aesthetic — scale_roughness_continuous
text: geom_sketch_point() lets map variable roughness (aes(roughness = z)). scale rescales variable's observed range legible band roughness values, just scale_size() rescales size range. applied automatically whenever roughness mapped continuous variable, call directly change range. use values raw roughness rescaling, wrap base::() (aes(roughness = (z))).

title: Continuous scale for the sketch roughness aesthetic — scale_roughness_continuous

text: ... arguments passed ggplot2::continuous_scale(). range Output roughness range. Default c(0.01, 0.75): 0.01 effectively clean 0.75 clearly hand-drawn without becoming noise. Values roughly 1 start look scribbled. guide Legend guide. Defaults "none" legend keys reflect roughness; set "legend" show one anyway.

title: Continuous scale for the sketch roughness aesthetic — scale_roughness_continuous
text: ggplot2 scale object.

title: Continuous scale for the sketch roughness aesthetic — scale_roughness_continuous
code: library(ggplot2)  # Mapped roughness is rescaled to c(0.01, 0.75) automatically. ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, roughness = hp)) +   geom_sketch_point(size = 3, seed = 1L)   # Widen the band so the wobble difference is more dramatic. ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, roughness = hp)) +   geom_sketch_point(size = 3, seed = 1L) +   scale_roughness_continuous(range = c(0, 1.2))

what: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
title: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
text: geom_sketch_shade() shades region tone aesthetic [0, 1] (0 = blank paper, 1 = densest cross-hatch). Mapping raw variable tone (aes(tone = z)) rescales observed range legible tone band scale, just scale_size() rescales size range. applied automatically whenever tone mapped continuous variable, call directly change range (reverse giving decreasing range). use values raw tone rescaling, wrap base::() (aes(tone = (z))).

title: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
code: scale_tone_continuous(..., range = c(0.15, 0.95), guide = "none")  scale_engrave(..., range = c(0.15, 0.95), guide = "none")

title: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
text: ... arguments passed ggplot2::continuous_scale(). range Output tone range, within [0, 1]. Default c(0.15, 0.95): 0.15 faintest hatch still draws (engraving ladder leaves tone 0.12 blank paper, lower floor erase lightest region entirely) 0.95 near-solid black. Give decreasing range (e.g. c(0.95, 0.15)) invert mapping. guide Legend guide. Defaults "none" legend keys reflect tone; set "legend" show one anyway.

title: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
text: ggplot2 scale object.

title: Continuous scale for the engraving tone aesthetic — scale_tone_continuous
code: library(ggplot2)  hex <- data.frame(   x = cos(seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 7))[-7],   y = sin(seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 7))[-7] ) regions <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:3, function(k) {   transform(hex, x = x + (k - 1) * 2.3, g = k, val = k) }))  # `val` is rescaled to the default tone band c(0.15, 0.95) automatically. ggplot(regions, aes(x, y, group = g)) +   geom_sketch_shade(aes(tone = val), seed = 1L) +   coord_equal()   # Push the darkest region all the way to solid black. ggplot(regions, aes(x, y, group = g)) +   geom_sketch_shade(aes(tone = val), seed = 1L) +   scale_tone_continuous(range = c(0.15, 1)) +   coord_equal()

what: Create a sketchy arrow grob — sketch_arrow_grob
title: Create a sketchy arrow grob — sketch_arrow_grob
text: Draws one hand-drawn arrows. shaft quadratic Bezier (can curve) arrowhead roughened oriented curve's end tangent, assembled device inches head stays crisp correctly angled panel shape. arrowhead size can adapt shaft length.

title: Create a sketchy arrow grob — sketch_arrow_grob
code: sketch_arrow_grob(   x0,   y0,   cx,   cy,   x1,   y1,   roughness = 1,   bowing = 1,   n_passes = 2L,   seed = NULL,   arrow_length = NULL,   arrow_angle = 25,   arrow_type = "open",   arrow_head = NULL,   ends = "last",   gp = gpar(),   name = NULL,   vp = NULL )

title: Create a sketchy arrow grob — sketch_arrow_grob
text: x0, y0 Shaft start npc [0,1] (vectors, one per arrow). cx, cy Quadratic-Bezier control point npc (vectors). straight arrow pass chord midpoint. x1, y1 Shaft end / arrow tip npc (vectors). roughness, bowing, n_passes, seed Sketch parameters. arrow_length Arrowhead length inches. NULL (default) adapts shaft length. arrow_angle Half-angle arrowhead degrees. Default 25. arrow_type "open" (default) draws two-stroke V; "closed" draws filled rough triangle. Superseded arrow_head; kept back-compat. arrow_head Head style, one sketch_arrowheads() ("triangle_open", "triangle_filled", "barb", "fishtail", "dot", "bar"). NULL (default) derives arrow_type. ends end(s) carry head: "last" (default), "first", "". gp grid::gpar() strokes (per-arrow col recycled). name, vp Passed grid::gTree().

title: Create a sketchy arrow grob — sketch_arrow_grob
text: SketchArrowGrob grob subclass.

Edge dots shrink toward 0.4 * dot_r. seed Integer seed scatter (ADR-0004).

text: function t returning numeric multiplier length.

what: Build a variable-width stroke as a closed polygon ribbon — stroke_ribbon
title: Build a variable-width stroke as a closed polygon ribbon — stroke_ribbon
text: Offsets centreline left right per-vertex half-width closes loop single polygon, hand-drawn stroke can taper, swell pressure, vary like broad calligraphic nib – effects grid constant-lwd polyline. centreline used supplied (roughen first roughen_polyline() sketchy edge); routine offsets, deterministic apart jitter_w.

title: Build a variable-width stroke as a closed polygon ribbon — stroke_ribbon
code: stroke_ribbon(   x,   y,   width,   taper = c("none", "both", "start", "end"),   taper_frac = 0,   pressure = NULL,   nib_angle = NULL,   nib_floor = 0.15,   jitter_w = 0,   cap = c("round", "butt"),   miter_limit = 3,   seed = NULL )

title: Build a variable-width stroke as a closed polygon ribbon — stroke_ribbon
text: x, y Numeric vectors centreline vertices inch space (length). width Full stroke width inches: scalar, per-vertex vector. taper stroke narrows tip: "none" (default), "", "start", "end". taper_frac Tip width fraction width (0 = sharp point, 1 = narrowing). Default 0. pressure Optional vectorised function f(t) normalised arc-length t [0, 1] returning width multiplier (see stroke_profile()). NULL (default) constant pressure. nib_angle Optional broad-nib angle degrees calligraphic stroke: half-width scaled |sin(segment_dir - nib_angle)| (small floor), line thick across nib thin along . NULL (default) disables . nib_floor Minimum nib multiplier [0, 1], calligraphic stroke never fully vanishes. Default 0.15. jitter_w Width roughening [0, 1]: random per-vertex modulation half-width, dry / inky edge. Default 0. cap End-cap style: "round" (default) "butt". miter_limit Clamp joint miter factor, capping far outside corner extends sharp turn. Default 3. seed Integer seed jitter_w (ADR-0004).

title: Build a variable-width stroke as a closed polygon ribbon — stroke_ribbon
text: 2-column (x, y) matrix giving closed ribbon polygon (right side forward, end cap, left side back, start cap). Fill stroke colour border solid variable-width stroke.

what: A hand-drawn theme for ggplot2 — theme_sketch
title: A hand-drawn theme for ggplot2 — theme_sketch
text: sketch-style theme based ggplot2::theme_bw() muted palette match rough geoms.  Light (default) dark presets available via dark.  sketchiness marks comes geoms ; theme styles surrounding frame, typography, background.

title: A hand-drawn theme for ggplot2 — theme_sketch
code: theme_sketch(   base_size = 11,   base_family = getOption("ggsketch.base_family", ""),   base_line_size = base_size/22,   base_rect_size = base_size/22,   dark = FALSE,   rough_frame = FALSE,   roughness = 0.5,   paper = "none",   seed = NULL )

title: A hand-drawn theme for ggplot2 — theme_sketch
text: base_size Base font size (default 11). base_family Base font family. Defaults getOption("ggsketch.base_family", ""); "" uses device default. "auto" picks first installed handwriting font (see ggsketch_check_fonts()), falling back device default. Set options(ggsketch.base_family = "auto") make every sketch plot's text (titles, axes, legend) use handwriting, just labels drawn geom_sketch_text() / geom_sketch_bracket(). pass explicit family name. base_line_size Line size (default base_size / 22). base_rect_size Rect size (default base_size / 22). dark TRUE, use dark "chalkboard" preset. Default FALSE (light "paper" preset). rough_frame TRUE, draw frame hand-drawn: major gridlines, panel border, axis ticks, facet strip backgrounds, continuous-scale colourbar frame ticks become roughened sketch grobs (via element_sketch_line() / element_sketch_rect()) whole frame matches marks. Default FALSE. roughness Roughness rough frame (used rough_frame = TRUE). Default 0.5. paper Paper ground drawn behind data: one sketch_papers() ("none" (default), "notebook", "graph", "dotted", "aged", "blueprint", "chalkboard", "kraft"). non-"none" paper paints simulated texture panel background, recolours plot ground text suit (light text dark blueprint / chalkboard grounds), suppresses default gridlines paper supplies ruling. seed Integer seed rough frame, reproducible wobble. NULL uses getOption("ggsketch.seed", 1L).

title: A hand-drawn theme for ggplot2 — theme_sketch
text: ggplot2::theme object.

title: Build a watercolour wash for a polygon region — watercolor_wash

NULL (default) scales ~2% shape's bounding diagonal. granulation Fraction [0, 1]: density pigment specks (0 = none). Default 0. grain Paper-grain coupling [0, ~1]: strongly edge feathers along paper tooth. 0 (default) historical pure-uniform jitter; higher values wick edge coherent capillary channels (see paper_grain()). 0 draws extra randomness, existing seeds reproduce. seed Integer seed.
