title: Build a hole-aware watercolour wash for a multi-ring region — watercolor_wash_multi
text: multi-ring analogue watercolor_wash(): wash layer jittered, resized copy every ring, grob can paint layer one even-odd path keep holes empty (rings shrink/grow centroid). Used band / multi-ring grobs (filled contours, density bands).

title: Build a hole-aware watercolour wash for a multi-ring region — watercolor_wash_multi
code: watercolor_wash_multi(   rings,   n_layers = 6L,   bleed = NULL,   granulation = 0,   grain = 0,   seed = NULL )

title: Build a hole-aware watercolour wash for a multi-ring region — watercolor_wash_multi
text: rings list rings, list inch-space x y vertex vectors. Even-odd nesting defines holes. n_layers Number wash copies. Default 6. bleed Edge irregularity inches. NULL (default) scales ~2% combined bounding diagonal. granulation Fraction [0, 1]: density pigment specks (0 = none). Default 0. Specks land inside even-odd region (never holes). grain Paper-grain coupling [0, ~1]: strongly ring's edge feathers along paper tooth. 0 (default) historical pure-uniform jitter draws extra randomness. See paper_grain(). seed Integer seed.

title: Build a hole-aware watercolour wash for a multi-ring region — watercolor_wash_multi
text: list washes (list layers; layer list 2-column (x, y) ring matrices, outermost/lightest first) granules (list(x, y, r) inches, NULL).

title: ggsketch 2.0.0
text: 2.0 series turns ggsketch line style drawing-medium simulator. first piece engine makes possible. Chicklet charts. New geom_sketch_chicklet() – hand-drawn take ggchicklet::geom_chicklet(). stacks rounded “pill” segments small segment_gap solid fill default; add coord_flip() classic horizontal layout. Built geom_sketch_col(), inherits every fill style, drawing medium, sketch parameter. Repelled labels escape panel corners. repel_layout() solver now picks separation axis room left inside panel bounds, labels pressed corner fan along edge instead clamped back top (previously e.g. three overlapping boxes scatter’s corner). Calendar axes read calendars. geom_sketch_calendar() now labels y axis weekday names (honouring week_start) x axis month names instead raw grid numbers; set labels = FALSE supply scales. Saner default hachure pitch. hachure_gap NULL, sketch_polygon_grob() now picks gap draw time device inches – 15% shape’s smaller drawn extent, clamped [0.04, 0.4] – instead geoms guessing data units. Wide flat rectangles (Gantt/funnel/pyramid bars, long tiles) longer degenerate huge strokes escaping outline, geom_sketch_gantt()/funnel()/pyramid() drop fixed 0.12 workaround pitch. explicit hachure_gap honoured unchanged, default-gap output shifts slightly. Rect geoms bend nonlinear coords. geom_sketch_rect(), geom_sketch_tile(), geom_sketch_col()/bar() now densify boundaries coordinate transform, bars coord_polar() / coord_sketch_polar() curve proper wedges rings instead straight-edged quads. Radar legend fix. geom_sketch_radar() longer leaks NA key mapped discrete fill scale, colour fill legends merge one (previously two legends, one spurious NA entry). Edge labels never clipped. geom_sketch_bump(), geom_sketch_arc_diagram(), geom_sketch_parallel(), geom_sketch_dendrogram() now reserve panel room end/leaf/axis labels (dendrogram’s rotated labels hang cleanly away tree), nothing cut plot edge theme_void(). lightest engraved region always draws. scale_tone_continuous()’s default band now c(0.15, 0.95) (c(0.1, 0.95)), keeping faintest mapped tone engraving ladder’s blank-paper threshold – previously lightest geom_sketch_shade() region disappear entirely. Alluvial strata gaps. geom_sketch_alluvial() gains stratum_gap (default 0.02): small vertical gap adjacent strata roughened boxes never overlap shared edge; 0 restores flush stacking. Variable-width strokes (Layer 1 + Layer 2). stroke_ribbon() builds hand-drawn stroke filled polygon ribbon offset around centreline, line can taper point, swell pressure, vary like broad calligraphic nib – effects grid produce constant-lwd polyline. stroke_profile() supplies ready-made width profiles ("taper_in", "taper_out", "belly", "flat"), sketch_stroke_grob() renders path variable-width ribbons, re-roughening centreline device resolution (round butt caps, optional width jitter dry edge, nib_angle calligraphy). foundation forthcoming media (ink, brush, pencil, charcoal, calligraphy) built . Drawing media path geoms. new medium argument selects line laid : "pen" (default – classic constant-width double stroke, unchanged), "ink", "brush", "pencil", "charcoal", "marker", "crayon", render variable-width engine – tapered ink, brushy belly swells, grainy multi-pass pencil/charcoal, translucent marker, waxy crayon. Available geom_sketch_line(), geom_sketch_path(), geom_sketch_segment(), geom_sketch_step(); sketch_media() lists options. Existing plots unaffected (default stays "pen"). Three drawing media. "fountain_pen" (crisp, wet line pools slightly ends), "ballpoint" (thin, even, faintly skipping stroke), "pastel" (broad, soft, grainy translucent mark, lighter charcoal) join medium family scale_medium_discrete() palette. Waterfall charts. geom_sketch_waterfall() floats step’s delta (y) running total running total across categories (x), dotted hand-drawn connectors carrying level gaps. Bars colour direction (fill_increase / fill_decrease / fill_total, map fill after_stat(change) ), optional measure = "total" aesthetic draws closing-total bars zero, fill_style works (including "watercolor"). Gantt / timeline charts. geom_sketch_gantt() draws one roughened bar per task x (start) xend (end) discrete y – whiteboard project-planning look. optional progress aesthetic (0-1) overlays slimmer, darker solid bar completed fraction; bars take rounded corners (corner_radius), dates x fill_style. Funnel population-pyramid charts. geom_sketch_funnel() centres one bar per stage zero width equal stage’s value, shrinking bars read drop-, translucent trapezoid connectors carrying stage next. geom_sketch_pyramid() draws back--back bars mirrored zero two-level side aesthetic – population pyramid. take every fill_style. Font-aware export helper. ggsketch_save() drop-ggplot2::ggsave() wrapper picks device able see fonts registered register_sketch_font(): ragg raster formats, svglite SVG, cairo_pdf PDF (base pdf device misses registered fonts), warns PostScript users towards PDF – ending “handwriting font disappeared saved file” footgun. One-call style presets. sketch_style() bundles paper ground, qualitative colour/fill palette tuned (ggplot2 >= 4.0) matching default geom ink single +-able object: p + sketch_style("chalkboard"). Presets: "notebook", "chalkboard", "blueprint", "field_notes" "graphite"; sketch_styles() lists , palette = FALSE keeps scales. Highlighter swipes hand-drawn underlines. annotate_sketch_highlight() lays wide translucent chisel-tip band (new highlighter medium) region interest one call, annotate_sketch_underline() draws quick wobbly underline (strokes > 1 re-draws emphatic scrawl). Chalk highlighter media. medium = "chalk" draws broad, dry, flat-ended stroke faint halo settled dust either side line – made theme_sketch(paper = "chalkboard") light stroke colour. medium = "highlighter" lays single translucent chisel-tip band crisp edges, swipe drawn () pen line reads fluorescent emphasis rather line . Airbrush / spray medium. new medium = "spray" renders line soft cloud dots scattered around centreline hard outline – spray-can / airbrush look. Powered new Layer-1 sampler spray_scatter() (Gaussian perpendicular offset, density falloff feathered edges) Layer-2 sketch_spray_grob() re-roughens scatters device resolution. Selectable per group via aes(medium = ) like media. Paper / canvas grounds. theme_sketch(paper = ) paints simulated paper texture behind data: "notebook" (blue rules + red margin), "graph", "dotted", "aged" (warm ground soft blotches), "blueprint" "chalkboard" (dark grounds flip text light), "kraft". ruling spaced physical inches looks right panel aspect, everything drawn vector primitives, reproduces every device. element_sketch_paper() underlying panel-background element (usable directly theme()), sketch_papers() lists grounds. default "none" leaves theme unchanged. Watercolour fill. new fill_style = "watercolor" paints region stacked translucent washes instead stroked fill lines: jittered boundary copies overlap colour deepens toward interior, irregular edges feather like pigment bleeding wet paper, scatter darker specks reads pigment granulation. Overlapping shapes blend wet--wet. works every polygon-fill geom (geom_sketch_polygon(), geom_sketch_area(), geom_sketch_col() / bar(), geom_sketch_rect() / tile(), geom_sketch_violin(), geom_sketch_boxplot(), geom_sketch_ridgeline(), …), ellipse/circle geoms (geom_sketch_circle(), mark_circle / mark_ellipse family), hole-aware band geoms (geom_sketch_contour_filled(), geom_sketch_density_2d_filled()) washes respect holes via new Layer-1 watercolor_wash_multi(). Powered new Layer-1 watercolor_wash(). Everything vector, reproduces every device. Watercolour media physics: wet--wet bleed ink--paper grain. Two couplings make washes behave like real pigment. two watercolour regions overlap, pigments now mingle: new Layer-1 wash_bleed() samples shared area lays soft specks tinted blended colour, overlap reads mixed paint (toggle options(ggsketch.wash_bleed =)). wash edge now feathers along paper tooth: watercolor_wash() gains grain argument wicks boundary coherent capillary channels, theme_sketch(paper = ) couples automatically new paper_grain() (smooth notebook/graph grounds wick little; aged kraft wick lot). grain = 0 historical look draws extra randomness, existing seeds reproduce exactly. medium now mappable aesthetic. path-like geoms (geom_sketch_line(), geom_sketch_path(), geom_sketch_segment(), geom_sketch_step()) can map discrete variable aes(medium = ) draw group (segment) different medium, scale_medium_discrete() chooses media levels map . legend keys render medium. Setting medium constant still works exactly , default unchanged ("pen"). pressure mappable aesthetic. geom_sketch_line() / geom_sketch_path(), map aes(pressure = ) variable make stroke swell thin along line, like pen pressed harder places. line renders variable-width stroke_ribbon() engine even default medium = "pen", combines non-pen medium (width profiles multiply). Values rescaled new scale_pressure_continuous() (default band c(0.2, 1.6)); wrap () raw multipliers. Per-vertex pressure carried interpolated arc-length profile, stays correct centreline re-roughened device resolution. sketch colour palette now interpolates. scale_colour_sketch() / scale_fill_sketch() (sketch_palette()) used recycle factor eight levels. now interpolate eight ink--paper anchors one distinct colour per level via colorRampPalette() ramp, discrete scales keep working large factors quasi-continuous use. first eight colours unchanged, small plots look identical; pass interpolate = FALSE old recycling behaviour. coord_sketch(). drop-replacement coord_cartesian() draws frame hand-drawn – panel gridlines axis ticks become roughened sketch grobs – theme, theme_sketch(). reuses ggplot2’s gridline axis layout swaps elements drawn, limits, expansion, clipping behave exactly like coord_cartesian(). rough_grid / rough_ticks toggle element; combine theme_sketch(rough_frame = TRUE) roughen panel border . coord_sketch_polar(). polar companion coord_sketch() – drop-replacement coord_polar() draws circular grid hand-drawn (wobbly concentric rings radial spokes), rose / circular bar charts get frame matches marks theme. Like coord_sketch() reuses ggplot2’s polar layout swaps grid drawn (theta, start, direction behave coord_polar()). New chart families: geom_sketch_dumbbell() geom_sketch_slope(). Two hand-drawn comparison charts. geom_sketch_dumbbell() draws roughened connector x xend shared y, capped sketch dot end (separate colour_x / colour_xend), showing gap two paired values per category. geom_sketch_slope() draws one roughened line per group across ordered x dot vertex – sketch slopegraph /rank changes. reuse existing stroke point grobs, need new dependencies. New chart family: geom_sketch_beeswarm(). hand-drawn beeswarm (dot-strip) plot – categorical x points nudged sideways longer overlap, width swarm reads local density y. offset computed deterministically data space (device metrics, fully reproducible) dots drawn geom_sketch_point(), keep usual wobble. width widens swarm; binwidth / nbins control y rows. new dependencies (cf. ggbeeswarm::geom_beeswarm()). New chart family: geom_sketch_ridgeline(). hand-drawn ridgeline (joyplot) – kernel density x category discrete y, raised baseline ridges overlap changing shape distribution easy compare. scale sets far tallest ridge rises (values 1 overlap), rel_min_height trims tails, fill honours every fill_style including "watercolor". Ridges drawn back--front nearer ones sit top. Powered new StatSketchDensityRidges; new dependencies (cf. ggridges::geom_density_ridges()). New chart family: geom_sketch_waffle(). hand-drawn waffle chart – square grid (default 10x10 = 100 cells) number cells colour reads category’s share whole. Map category fill (summarised data) count weight; cells tallied new StatSketchWaffle (largest-remainder rounding) drawn geom_sketch_tile(), take roughened outline fill_style (including "watercolor"). new dependencies (cf. waffle::geom_waffle()). New chart family: geom_sketch_treemap(). hand-drawn treemap – nested rectangles tiling square, area proportional value, biggest categories take space. Map value area, category fill, optionally label write name tile. Rectangles placed new Layer-1 squarified algorithm (treemap_layout(), exported) drawn roughened rect look, take fill_style. new dependencies (cf. treemapify::geom_treemap()). New chart family: geom_sketch_streamgraph(). hand-drawn streamgraph (ThemeRiver) – stacked area whose baseline floats coloured bands flow around moving centre. Map x, y, fill; new StatSketchStream stacks values offsets baseline (offset = "silhouette" centred, "zero" normal stacked area, "wiggle" minimise slope), band drawn roughened ribbon (fill_style, including "watercolor"). new dependencies (cf. ggstream::geom_stream()). New chart family: geom_sketch_calendar(). hand-drawn calendar heatmap GitHub-contributions style – one roughened tile per day, laid weeks (columns) weekdays (rows), coloured value. Map date fill; new StatSketchCalendar builds week/weekday grid (week_start chooses Sunday Monday top), tiles drawn geom_sketch_tile() (default fill_style = "solid" gradient reads). Facet year column multiple years. new dependencies. Flagship: hand-drawn networks. geom_sketch_node() geom_sketch_edge() draw graph sketch way – roughened node markers optional handwriting labels, roughened (optionally curved, via curvature) edges. sketch_graph() bridge: give two-column edge data frame (igraph object) returns ready--plot nodes edges frames, positioning nodes force_layout(), -scratch pure-R Fruchterman-Reingold force-directed layout – whole flagship needs graph dependency. igraph optional, guarded convenience ingestion ; extra edge/node columns carried attributes can map. layout seeded reproducible never disturbs global RNG. Flagship: hand-drawn maps (sf). geom_sketch_sf() sketch take ggplot2::geom_sf(): roughens boundaries simple-features geometry one call – (MULTI)POLYGON features get hole-aware hachure (fill_style), (MULTI)LINESTRING features become sketch paths, (MULTI)POINT features become sketch points. extracts coordinates sf object front draws ordinary sketch layers, sidesteps coord_sf()/stat_sf() plots planar coordinates – pre-project lon/lat data sf::st_transform() faithful map. sf optional, guarded dependency (Suggests); needed call geom. Radar / spider charts. geom_sketch_radar() draws series closed roughened polygon evenly spaced angular axes, behind hand-drawn web concentric rings, radial spokes axis labels. Map axis, value group (plus colour/fill); values scaled common outer ring (rmax) polygon takes fill_style, including "watercolor". Like pie geoms lives square space – pair coord_equal(). new dependencies (cf. ggradar, fmsb::radarchart()). Chord diagrams. geom_sketch_chord() lays nodes circle, given rim arc proportional total flow, draws every weighted relation ribbon whose ends sub-arcs joined curves centre. Give edge table , value columns; ribbons coloured source node (add [scale_fill_sketch()] fill scale), take fill_style, self-loops dropped. Pair coord_equal(). new dependencies (cf. circlize::chordDiagram()). Alluvial / Sankey diagrams. geom_sketch_alluvial() draws two categorical axes stacks strata, joined flows whose thickness frequency category combination. Give wide data frame, axes columns (order), optional value weight, optional fill column (default: first axis); flows get raised-cosine edges fill_style. draws ordinary x/y space – pair theme_void(). new dependencies (cf. ggalluvial, ggsankey). Motion. animate_sketch() animates sketch plot two ways. type = "boil" (default) re-renders shifting every roughening seed per frame, whole drawing shimmers re-draws like hand-animated cel (“boiling line” effect); shift rides new global ggsketch.seed_jitter option resolve_seed() adds every resolved seed – explicit inherited – plot boils change code, frame 1 reproduces static render exactly. type = "draw_on" instead reveals finished drawing progressively, hand drawing . reveal can straight wipe (direction "lr"/"rl"/"bt"/"tb"), diagonal wipe ("diag"), circular iris opening centre ("radial"), pacing across frames follows easing curve ("linear", "ease_in", "ease_out", "ease_in_out"). Frames stitched GIF gifski magick installed (guarded Suggests, new hard dependency); otherwise frame paths returned. Fully reproducible seed. rough_frame now reaches facet strips colourbar. theme_sketch(rough_frame = TRUE) already drew gridlines, panel border axis ticks hand-drawn; now also roughens facet strip backgrounds continuous-scale colourbar frame ticks, faceted colour-mapped plot’s whole frame matches marks. reuse existing element_sketch_rect() / element_sketch_line() elements (work directly strip.background, legend.frame legend.ticks theme), new function fragile facet/guide subclass involved. Two new tonal fills: "stipple" "pencil_shade". fill_style = "stipple" scatters fine rough dots random interior points (pointillist tone visible lattice, unlike grid-aligned "dots"); fill_style = "pencil_shade" lays trimmed graphite strokes plus sparser cross set small angle soft directional shading. work every polygon-fill geom respect holes band geoms (via new multi-ring variants). Density / texture follow hachure_gap roughness usual. Ink--paper grain now reaches line media . paper-tooth coupling feathers watercolour washes (theme_sketch(paper = )) now also roughens variable-width stroke media (ink, brush, pencil, charcoal, …): toothy ground ("aged", "kraft") centreline wet edge pick extra grain, drawing reads consistently across line fill. -op plain ground, existing plots unchanged. Repelled labels (sketch answer ggrepel). geom_sketch_text_repel() geom_sketch_label_repel() place text / boxed labels near points nudged apart longer overlap cover data, tied back anchor hand-drawn leader. new Layer-1 force solver repel_layout() placement (run device inches draw time, repulsion even panel aspect): overlapping boxes shove apart, boxes slide points cover, weak spring keeps label near names. boxes leaders roughened like rest ggsketch; glyphs stay handwriting font (ADR-0007). new dependency (cf. ggrepel). Callout leader routing. geom_sketch_callout() (annotate_sketch_callout()) gain leader =: "straight" (default), "elbow" (horizontal vertical, flowchart style) "curved" (bowed Bezier, sized curvature). arrowhead re-orients leader’s end tangent every route. Backed new Layer-1 leader_path(). Arrowhead vocabulary. Arrows callout leaders now take head = argument choosing head style: "triangle_open" (classic two-stroke V), "triangle_filled", "barb" (swept-back harpoon barbs), "fishtail" (forked swallowtail), "dot" (blob) "bar" (perpendicular tick), geom_sketch_arrow() gains ends = ("last" / "first" / "") double-headed arrows. One Layer-1 generator arrowhead() (listed sketch_arrowheads()) drives geom_sketch_arrow(), annotate_sketch_arrow() geom_sketch_callout() alike. old arrow_type ("open"/"closed") still works maps onto new styles. Faster boil animations (frame caching). animate_sketch(type = "boil") now computes plot’s build (statistics, scales, layout) re-tables / re-draws per frame, instead rebuilding whole plot every frame – boil ever varied draw time. Output unchanged (frame 1 still equals static render); heavier plots (stats, large data, contours) see biggest speed-. gganimate bridge. boil_gganimate() renders gganimate animation – ggsketch plot plus transition_*() – , top gganimate’s data tweening (bars growing, points flying states, line drawing along x), hand-drawn lines boil: roughening seed steps per frame gganimate draws , marks shimmer data moves. moving-data companion animate_sketch() (boils static plot), keyed per-frame counter frame 1 un-boiled run reproduces. gganimate optional Suggests; frames stitched gifski / magick backend, returned paths. Parallel-coordinates plots. geom_sketch_parallel() draws several numeric columns vertical axes every observation roughened polyline crossing values. Give axes columns (order); axes scale independently common height default, colour maps column lines. new dependencies (cf. GGally::ggparcoord(), MASS::parcoord()). Mosaic plots. geom_sketch_mosaic() splits unit square columns marginal counts one categorical variable, column vertically conditional counts second, every roughened tile’s area joint frequency. Give x, y optional value weight; colour y (default) x. new dependencies (cf. graphics::mosaicplot(), ggmosaic). Sunburst charts. geom_sketch_sunburst() draws hierarchy nested rings roughened annular sectors: columns levels define hierarchy inner root ring outward, deeper ring splits parent’s angular span children’s summed value, child always nests inside parent. Colour top-level ancestor (fill_by = "root", classic look), node, ring. Pair coord_equal() + theme_void(). new dependencies (cf. sunburstR, plotly). Arc diagrams. geom_sketch_arc_diagram() lays nodes along horizontal line draws every weighted relation roughened semicircle arching (, side = "bottom") axis endpoints - linear cousin chord diagram. Edges coloured source width scales value; node points scale incident weight. new dependencies (cf. arcdiagram, ggraph). Bump / ranking charts. geom_sketch_bump() draws series’ rank every time point joins across adjacent times smooth roughened curves, crossing reads one series overtaking another. Give long data x (time), group (series) value (ranked within time); colour series label ends. new dependencies (cf. ggbump). Dendrograms. geom_sketch_dendrogram() draws hierarchical-clustering tree right-angle elbows roughened hand-drawn wobble. Pass ready stats::hclust() object numeric data frame (tree computed via hclust(dist(...)), method/distance controls). Four orientations (//left/right). Pure base stats; new dependencies (cf. ggdendro). Marimekko charts. geom_sketch_marimekko() draws variable-width stacked bars: column’s width one category’s (x) share total stacked segments second category’s (fill) shares, every tile’s area joint value. value-weighted, segment-coloured cousin mosaic plot (reuses layout); shows column’s width percent top. new dependencies. Coxcomb / Nightingale rose charts. geom_sketch_rose() gives category equal angular wedge whose radius encodes value; area_true = TRUE sector area (radius square-root) encodes value, Florence Nightingale’s mortality roses. optional fill category stacks radially within wedge. Pair coord_equal() + theme_void(). new dependencies. Engraving: tonal shading line density. new module shades density hand-drawn hatch lines, way etcher banknote engraver builds gradient – light areas stay near-blank, shadows accumulate dense cross-hatch. Unlike fill-pattern packages (tile motif), tone computed geometry. geom_sketch_engrave() shades x/y/z surface (high z = dark); geom_sketch_shade() shades polygon region uniform density set tone aesthetic, mapped value reads darkness. Powered new Layer-1 engine (engrave_fill() / engrave_ladder(), exposed Layer 1) lays ladder hatch layers keeps tone reaches threshold, reusing hole-aware scan-line. pitch floor (min_gap_in) keeps darkest tones exploding runaway number strokes. scale_tone_continuous() (alias scale_engrave()) rescales mapped variable legible tone band, aes(tone = z) works way scale_size() size; wrap () use raw tone. geom_sketch_engrave() takes x/y/z grid directly, shades raw points density stat, e.g. geom_sketch_engrave(stat = "density_2d", contour = FALSE, aes(z = after_stat(density))). Dot plots. geom_sketch_dotplot() draws hand-drawn Wilkinson-style dot plot: data binned along x one roughened circular dot per observation stacked upward bin. Dots stay round panel aspect (diameter taken bin width converted device inches draw time). sketch analogue ggplot2::geom_dotplot(). Filled contour 2-D density bands. geom_sketch_contour_filled() geom_sketch_density_2d_filled() fill bands contour levels (just lines). band region may contain holes (next level , cut ); new hole-aware scan-line filler (hachure_fill_multi() / sketch_fill_multi(), exposed Layer 1) keeps holes empty, fill_style = "hachure" "cross_hatch" work multi-ring regions well "solid". completes filled *_filled family planned since 1.3.0. Bounding marks. geom_sketch_mark_circle(), geom_sketch_mark_ellipse(), geom_sketch_mark_rect() draw roughened bounding shape around group points – sketch analogues ggforce::geom_mark_circle() / geom_mark_ellipse() / geom_mark_rect(), completing mark family started geom_sketch_mark_hull(). Shade mapped fill leave outline-. Lollipop charts. geom_sketch_lollipop() draws roughened stem baseline value, capped sketch point – tidy alternative bars ranked sparse values (cf. ggalt::geom_lollipop()). Set horizontal = TRUE horizontal stems. Empirical CDF. geom_sketch_ecdf() draws empirical cumulative distribution hand-drawn stairstep (sketch analogue ggplot2::stat_ecdf()). Content-aware arrows. geom_sketch_arrow() (one-annotate_sketch_arrow()) draw hand-drawn arrow (x, y) (xend, yend) optional handwriting label. “content-aware”: shaft curvature defaults automatic, pleasing bow whose side follows direction travel; roughened arrowhead orients curve’s end tangent, always points target however shaft bends; label justifies away target never sits shaft. arrow_type = "closed" gives filled rough arrowhead. Callouts. geom_sketch_callout() (annotate_sketch_callout()) draw handwriting label roughened rounded box, optionally leader arrow target. box auto-sizes label leader leaves box edge nearest target – sketch speech-bubble / callout. Hull marks. geom_sketch_mark_hull() draws roughened convex hull around group points (sketch analogue ggforce::geom_mark_hull()), circling grouping clusters; shade fill leave outline-. Hand-drawn pie donut charts. geom_sketch_pie() draws sketchy pie (one slice per row, sized amount aesthetic coloured fill); geom_sketch_donut() hole. Slices stay circular panel shape (radii taken smaller panel dimension assembled device space), look right without coord_fixed(). Slices solid default, rough edge; pass fill_style ("hachure", …) hatch instead. Arc geometry (Layer 1). New rough_arc() roughens elliptical arc open hand-drawn strokes (open-arc sibling rough_ellipse()), new sketch_wedge_grob() draws roughened pie/donut sectors. arc sampler powers pie/donut geoms. Rounded rectangles bars. geom_sketch_rect(), geom_sketch_tile(), geom_sketch_col() / geom_sketch_bar() gain corner_radius argument (fraction [0, 1] half-side) rounded corners. Default 0 keeps sharp corners, existing plots render identically.

title: ggsketch 1.6.0
text: roughness now mappable aesthetic per-shape geoms. Following geom_sketch_point(), can map roughness per shape aes(roughness = ) (rescaled scale_roughness_continuous()) set constant : geom_sketch_col() / geom_sketch_bar(), geom_sketch_rect() / geom_sketch_tile(), geom_sketch_circle() / geom_sketch_ellipse(), geom_sketch_segment() / geom_sketch_spoke(), point-based geom_sketch_jitter() / geom_sketch_count(). sketch_ellipse_grob() now takes per-shape roughness vector. Defaults unchanged, existing plots render identically. Path-like geoms (line, path, area, density, smooth, step, reference lines, …) keep roughness layer parameter, since per-row roughness ill-defined single path. Independent fill roughness seed. Every fill-bearing geom now accepts fill_roughness fill_seed, fill texture can controlled separately outline. Previously fill roughness hardwired fraction outline’s (roughness * 0.5 polygons, * 0.4 ellipses) shared outline’s seed. defaults unchanged (NULL keeps historical coupling), existing plots render identically; set values scratchier fill clean edge, reshuffle fill pattern without moving outline. Exposed sketch_polygon_grob() / sketch_ellipse_grob() threaded geom_sketch_col()/bar(), rect()/tile(), polygon(), area()/ribbon(), density(), violin(), circle()/ellipse(), crossbar(), boxplot(), hex(), smooth().

title: ggsketch 1.5.0
text: Annotation toolkit (first piece), roughness---aesthetic, real solid fill. geom_sketch_bracket() draws hand-drawn significance / comparison bracket spanning xmin xmax height y, short end tips optional handwriting label (e.g. p-value “n.s.”) centred . sketch counterpart ggsignif bracket, marking pairwise comparisons boxplots, bars, violins. roughness now mappable aesthetic geom_sketch_point(). Map variable (aes(roughness = z)) point wobbles less, set constant. mapped variable rescaled legible roughness band new scale_roughness_continuous() (default range c(0.01, 0.75)), applied automatically just like scale_size(); wrap values () use raw roughness. Rolling mappable treatment geoms planned.

title: ggsketch 1.5.0
text: fill_style = "solid" now actually paints shape fill colour instead leaving interior empty. Previously “solid” drew outline , fill colour computed never used shape stayed transparent (visible solid bars/columns). fill follows roughened boundary hand-drawn edge kept. Shapes fill (fill = NA) stay outline-. geom_sketch_boxplot() now defaults fill = NA, box stays outline-(effectively solid fill started painting). Pass fill solid box, fill_style = "hachure" fill shaded one. theme_sketch(base_family = ) now defaults getOption("ggsketch.base_family", ""), options(ggsketch.base_family = "auto") makes every sketch plot’s text (titles, axes, legend) use handwriting font, labels drawn geom_sketch_text() / geom_sketch_bracket().

title: ggsketch 1.4.0
text: frame can now roughened , plus matching colour palette, new fill style, reproducible fonts. Rough theme elements. element_sketch_line() element_sketch_rect() render gridlines, panel borders, axis ticks roughened sketch grobs. theme_sketch(rough_frame = TRUE) turns frame matches marks. Works ggplot2 3.5 4.0 (S3 element_grob methods; sketch params stored attributes survive theme merging). Sketch colour scales. scale_colour_sketch() / scale_fill_sketch() use qualitative palette (sketch_palette()) chosen suit hand-drawn look; *_sketch_c() variants give continuous blue gradient. New fill style "scribble" — one continuous winding stroke overshoots boundary, like scribbling fill shape. Available everywhere fill_style accepted. Reproducible fonts. register_sketch_font() registers handwriting font file (via systemfonts) result reproduces machine CI runner without system install; font resolver now also finds registered fonts.

title: ggsketch 1.4.0
text: geom_sketch_point() (geom_sketch_circle() / geom_sketch_ellipse()) now draw mark colour colour/fill aesthetic varies within single group — e.g. continuous scale scale_colour_sketch_c(). Previously every mark took first point’s colour, gradient looked flat. double-stroke outline now shares vertices across passes, reads one hand-drawn line gone twice rather two parallel lines. Previously pass jittered vertices independently strokes drift apart short flat edges (visible outlines like violins). geom_sketch_boxplot() draws median much less bowing thick median line reads one firm line rather bowed lens. handwriting-font resolver (base_family = "auto", geom_sketch_text()) now handles variable fonts. face Caveat ships variable font drawn name ragg/svglite (device falls back default), resolver pins renderable instance automatically. handwriting face now shows box, manual register_sketch_font() call needed.

title: ggsketch 1.3.0
text: New geoms (Tier 3, first batch — 2-D density text): geom_sketch_contour() — hand-drawn contour lines surface (via stat_contour). geom_sketch_density2d() / geom_sketch_density_2d() — 2-D kernel-density contour lines (via stat_density_2d). geom_sketch_hex() — hexagonal binning heatmap (needs optional hexbin package). geom_sketch_text() geom_sketch_label() — text handwriting font (sketch text font, roughened glyphs). now honour nudge_x/nudge_y like ggplot2::geom_text(), font resolver falls back handwriting faces preinstalled Windows/macOS (Segoe Print, Ink Free, Bradley Hand, Chalkboard, Comic Sans MS, …) sketchy face found even Caveat installed. Use font-aware device (ragg, svglite, cairo) render handwriting font; base GDI png() device may fall back default family. Still come Tier 3: filled contour / 2-D density bands (*_filled, need multi-ring hole-aware hachure) geom_sketch_dotplot().

title: ggsketch 1.2.0
text: New geoms (Tier 2 coverage — stats connectors; reuse existing grobs, one new optional dependency): geom_sketch_count() — points sized overplot count (via stat_sum). geom_sketch_function() — sketch function curve (via stat_function). geom_sketch_qq() geom_sketch_qq_line() — quantile-quantile points reference line. geom_sketch_quantile() — quantile regression lines (needs optional quantreg package). geom_sketch_rug() — marginal ticks along panel edges (sides). geom_sketch_spoke() — segments (x, y) angle + radius. geom_sketch_curve() — hand-drawn curved connector (quadratic Bezier). geom_sketch_bin2d() / geom_sketch_bin_2d() — rectangular 2-D bin heatmap.

title: ggsketch 1.1.0
text: New geoms (Tier 1 coverage — reuse existing grobs base ggplot2 stats; new hard dependencies): geom_sketch_histogram() geom_sketch_freqpoly() — binned distributions (via stat_bin). geom_sketch_jitter() — geom_sketch_point() jitter position. geom_sketch_violin() — mirrored kernel density hachure fill (via stat_ydensity). Interval family: geom_sketch_linerange(), geom_sketch_pointrange(), geom_sketch_errorbar(), geom_sketch_crossbar(). Reference lines: geom_sketch_abline(), geom_sketch_hline(), geom_sketch_vline().

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: First public release. grammar-native, pure-R implementation rough.js hand-drawn aesthetic ggplot2 — JavaScript, works every graphics device.

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: Lines & points: geom_sketch_line(), geom_sketch_path(), geom_sketch_point(). Bars & tiles: geom_sketch_col(), geom_sketch_bar(), geom_sketch_rect(), geom_sketch_tile(). Areas & curves: geom_sketch_polygon() (concave-safe fill), geom_sketch_ribbon(), geom_sketch_area(), geom_sketch_density(), geom_sketch_smooth(). Circular & composed: geom_sketch_circle(), geom_sketch_ellipse(), geom_sketch_segment(), geom_sketch_step(), geom_sketch_boxplot(). Helpers: annotate_sketch() theme_sketch() (light + dark presets).

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: hachure, cross_hatch, zigzag, zigzag_line, dots, dashed, solid, via full Active-Edge-Table scan-line filler handles concave polygons.

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: Three strict layers: pure geometry (Layer 1), grid grobs makeContent() (Layer 2), ggproto geoms (Layer 3). Roughening happens device-inch space. Reproducible: every randomized routine draws seeded local RNG stream never mutates user’s global .Random.seed. Set options(ggsketch.seed=). Sketchy legend keys every geom.

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: Algorithms reimplemented original R published descriptions; rough.js source included (see inst/NOTICE). Independent , affiliated , rough.js ggrough.

title: ggsketch 1.0.0
text: 0.0.1 — Layer 1 sketch core (roughen, ellipse, Bézier, hachure, fill styles). 0.1.0 — Layer 2 grobs + first geoms (line/path/point) + theme_sketch(). 0.2.0 — Filled rectangular geoms (col/bar/rect/tile) + fill-style coverage. 0.3.0 — Polygons, areas, ribbons, density, smooth. 1.0.0 — Circular & composed geoms, annotations, theming, docs, release.
